source: GloVe 6B 100d (Wikipedia 2014 + Gigaword 5, 400k vocab, PDDL), 51-word slice committed at inputs/glove-slice-100d.txt. DEVIATION note: pre-registration says "word2vec cosine"; GloVe cosine used as the small-footprint pretrained-embedding operationalisation (flagged in poc/e2/README.md).
convention: similarity (cosine, unit diagonal); item order = ids[]
